report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Crypto On-Ramps & Off-Ramps Guide 2026 and Crypto Portfolio Allocation Guide 2026 — with full SEO optimization, structured data, and internal linking; added both to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Crypto On-Ramps: Surveyed 7 major providers (MoonPay, Transak, Ramp Network, Alchemy Pay, Coinbase Onramp, Stripe Onramp, Banxa) — card fees range 1-5%, bank fees 0-1.5%, aggregators like Onramper route across 30+ providers to find cheapest rate
Crypto On-Ramps: Key trend is Open Banking / Pay-by-Bank (0.5-1.5% fees, near-instant) becoming the sweet spot in 2026, especially UK/EU
Portfolio Allocation: Institutional models (VanEck, XBTO) recommend 5-10% of total portfolio in crypto; 6% found optimal for traditional 60/40 portfolios
Portfolio Allocation: Conservative model (80% BTC, 15% ETH, 5% alts) produces ~45-50% volatility; aggressive (60/25/15) produces 55-60%
Portfolio Allocation: SOL staking yields 5-6% natively, up to 7-9% via Jito liquid staking with MEV tips in 2026
Identified content gap: no existing guide covered fiat on/off ramps or portfolio allocation strategy — both are high-volume evergreen search queries

sections.title: Content Created
items: Crypto On-Ramps & Off-Ramps Guide 2026 (~3,200 words): Covers types of on-ramps (CEXs, dedicated providers, aggregators, P2P), 7-provider fee comparison table, 4 payment methods with fee/speed cards, decision framework by use case, aggregator deep-dive (Onramper), security checklist, 6-item FAQ

Crypto Portfolio Allocation Guide 2026 (~3,500 words): Covers total portfolio sizing, 5 crypto asset categories, 4 model portfolios (Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive/Degen) with visual allocation bars, sector diversification table, DCA vs lump sum entry strategies, rebalancing approaches, 6 common mistakes with fixes, 6-item FAQ
Both guides include 5+ internal links to existing degen0x tools and learn pages, financial disclaimers, and related guides sections

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: On-Ramps: title 'Crypto On-Ramps & Off-Ramps Guide 2026 — Cheapest Ways to Buy & Sell | degen0x' (68 chars), target keywords: crypto on-ramp, crypto off-ramp, buy crypto, cheapest way to buy crypto 2026
On-Ramps: Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas via generateArticleSchema + generateFAQSchema, OG article type with publishedTime, Twitter summary_large_image

Portfolio: title 'Crypto Portfolio Allocation Guide 2026 — Model Portfolios & Strategy | degen0x' (72 chars), target keywords: crypto portfolio allocation, crypto portfolio strategy 2026, crypto diversification
Portfolio: Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG article type, 6 FAQ items targeting People Also Ask queries
Both pages use Breadcrumb component (auto-generates BreadcrumbList schema), include 5+ internal links with descriptive anchor text
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
